title: q-implement must explicitly commit worktree changes
context: The human attempted to merge the ai/F-03-e branch but it failed because q-implement left changes unstaged in the worktree.
content: Agents executing the /q-implement phase must execute `git add .` and `git commit` within the worktree before concluding. Quorum's architecture requires the system to commit the diff to the task branch so the human can merge it cleanly later. A dirty worktree prevents the branch pointer from advancing.
anti_patterns: Assuming changes in the worktree are automatically committed without running explicit git commands
